creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Seems to be fixed as seen in a recent snapshot release : 

FreeBSD hydra 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n254435-8af24219565: Thu Apr  7 07:32:59 UTC 2022     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 amd64 1400056 1400056

I will closed this as fixed in CURRENT. Maybe 13.1 will have this also.
